content_body: If you are looking for the perfect getaway with family and/or friends, this is definitely the place! The cabin was spotless! Seriously the cleanest place we have ever stayed, and we stay alot of places. The kitchen is fully stocked with everything you need to cook with. This is awesome because once you get here you don't want to go anywhere else. The layout of the cabin is truly the best layout I have ever been it. It's functional yet spacious. Whichever bedroom you stay in is private and comfortable. The beds were very comfortable and the bedding is amazing! The location is great, only about 20 mins to downtown Blue Ridge or Blairsville. About 45 mins to the main hiking trails, lake, and waterfalls. About 20 mins to the apple orchard. The outdoor fireplace was our favorite and made for a very relaxing and enjoyable time with family. Overall, this cabin is #1 on my list of places to stay. It's obvious that the owners and Cabin Rentals of Georgia truly care about their guests. Communication with the rental company was great and check-in/check-out was super easy.
title: Cleanest Cabin We Have Ever Experienced
